---
title: "import-tidy"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{import-tidy}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Principles
Import & tidy, different types of raw data files

```{r setup}
library(plate2N)
```

# Import
## Case of .TXT
bla bla

## Case of .csv
bla bla

## Case of skanit .csv
bla bla

## Other formats
Bring it to tibble

# Tidy table
Verticalize
